title: Luma Allays
description: This resource pack changes Allays into Luma from Mario Galaxy
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f20c670aef8019d4b8f5109a3c2fdbbfab406f3.png) ###

This is an updated and fixed version of the resource pack by Lasercraft32 with permission found [HERE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/luma-allays-optifine-resource-pack/) to work with more modern versions of Minecraft. Full credit for the original pack and artwork goes to Lasercraft32

*** ###

EMF and ETF Required

*** This resource pack (which requires EMF and ETF to work) remodels the Allays to look like Lumas from Super Mario Galaxy! They come in 10 different colors, and the first 8 are random. You can change the color of the Lumas simply by naming them with a nametag. It also changes Allay sound effects to adorable Luma noises! **Variants:**
Click to view - Yellow Luma - Red Luma - Blue Luma - Green Luma - Light Blue Luma - Pink Luma - Apricot Luma - Co-Star Luma - Polari - Purple Luma - Oxidized Luma - Lunar Luma - Rift Luma - Lumalee - Comet Tico - Chance Cube Lumalee - Lumberlee - Hungry Luma - Mario Cap Luma - Luigi Cap Luma - Moai Luma - Shadow Moai Luma - Liberland Luma - All-Mart Luma - Amethyst Luma - Cookie Luma - Creeper Luma - Cyan Luma - Ender Luma - Glow Luma - Ice Luma - Magma Luma - Lush Luma - Lumelon - Jack-O-Luma - Muddy Luma - Sculk Luma - Netherite Luma - Red Velvet Luma - Super Shrooma - 1-up Shrooma - Stone Luma - Wax Luma
